title: ferray-autodiff: higher-order derivatives (nested DualNumber) untested
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Forward-mode AD theoretically supports higher-order derivatives by nesting: DualNumber<DualNumber<f64>>. Since DualNumber<T> is generic over T: Float and implements Float itself, this should work. However it's completely untested. The T::from(2.0).unwrap() calls in sqrt, cbrt, exp2, log2, log10, to_degrees, to_radians may behave unexpectedly for nested dual numbers. Add explicit tests for second derivatives via nesting, or document that nesting is unsupported.
